verdict: Cloudflare AI Crawl Control activation BLOCKED by Cloudflare SPA + Chrome MCP environment incompatibility. All 5 attempted paths (Chrome ext dashboard, /api-tokens self-create, internal /api/v4 PATCH, public api.cloudflare.com fetch, Cloudflare MCP server) failed. Owner direct action remains the only feasible path: open Cloudflare dashboard in normal browser (not MCP-controlled) and toggle 3 features manually (5 min). Alternative: owner creates CF_API_TOKEN with Zone Settings Edit permission and stores in D:/00.test/neo-genesis/.env.local, then Claude executes PATCH via Python.
